curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The patch removes 'public' from the ACL options in @Route annotations across 24 API endpoint methods in includes/controllers/ApiController.php and 2 methods in tools/templates/controllers/ApiController.php. The advisory specifically describes unauthenticated archive creation and download, but the patch also fixes user management, comment, page, reaction, and triple endpoints. includes/YesWikiInit.php had only a cosmetic blank line removal and was excluded from locations.
